name: llm-wiki-web
description: Local Node.js preview server for LLM Wiki — renders wiki with mermaid, KaTeX, wikilinks, and lets you file feedback from the browser.

scripts.build:client: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/client', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('client/index.html', 'dist/client/index.html');"
